note: SR5 kinematic chain (nominal rokae_description URDF offsets, so the STL meshes join up with NO visual gap). These offsets drive ONLY the viewer's visual + preview IK -- real-arm commands go through the controller's own IK, never this chain. The 2026-07-16 calibration found link1 was ~28mm short in Z (0.328->0.3572) to match the controller flange to ~1.5mm; that correction lives in data/frame_calibration.json (and verify_frame_match.py) and is NOT applied here, because lifting link1 by 28mm separates the rigid base/J1 meshes (a floating gap). Joint rpy are all zero. The overhead mount (base height from config workspace.mount.base_xyz_mm[2], roll pi) is applied by the viewer, NOT here. Lengths in metres; meshes in mm (scale 0.001). Orientation convention rpy XYZ (R=Rz*Ry*Rx).
